headline: Seeking Clues to Moody's (MCO) Q1 Earnings? A Peek Into Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Moody's (MCO), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: Moody's Agentic Solutions Now Available in AWS Marketplace
summary: NEW YORK - Moody's Corporation today announced that its Moody's Agentic Solutions workflows are now available in AWS Marketplace. Available now with the MAS Credit Memo workflow, and with additional...

headline: A Look At Moody’s (MCO) Valuation After New Anthropic AI Collaboration
summary: Moody's (MCO) has put AI at the center of its risk business, partnering with Anthropic so Moody’s Agentic Solutions run directly inside Claude’s platforms for credit and compliance workflows in regulated settings. See our latest analysis for Moody's. Recent AI announcements sit against a mixed share price backdrop, with the 7 day share price return of 2.33% partly offsetting a 90 day share price return decline of 16.79%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 51.82% points to stronger...
